query_used: Query sales data for the West, East, and Central regions, then tell me which region had the highest revenue.
key_facts: Programmatic tool calling allows models like Claude to execute code that interacts with tools directly.
This feature reduces latency in multi-tool workflows by eliminating round trips to the model for each tool invocation.
Programmatic tool calling decreases token consumption by processing data before it reaches the model's context window.
The feature is available on Claude API and Microsoft Foundry.
It requires the code execution tool to be enabled.
Data retention for programmatic tool calling follows standard policies, not Zero Data Retention (ZDR) arrangements.
Claude can programmatically query databases and aggregate results efficiently.
An example API call shows querying sales data across multiple regions and returning structured results.
This feature enhances the capabilities of AI models in handling complex data-driven tasks.
Programmatic tool calling can improve the user experience by delivering faster responses and reducing costs associated with token usage.
It supports various programming tasks, enabling advanced functionalities in applications using AI.
structured_summary: Programmatic tool calling enhances Claude's ability to interact with external tools by executing code directly, leading to reduced latency and token usage. This feature is particularly useful for complex workflows and is available on the Claude API and Microsoft Foundry, requiring the activation of the code execution tool.
